title: calycobolus africanus
intro: Calycobolus africanus, also known as the African calycobolus, is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain, swelling, and the risk of infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes dried and made into a powder for use in herbal preparations.
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", calycobolus africanus has been found to possess immunostimulatory activities, which were shown to be higher than the positive control at certain doses.
